user_query: My family is planning a beach vacation and we want to ensure there are no severe weather alerts in the area. Fetch any severe weather alerts for the latitude 33.6846 and longitude -117.8265. Additionally, provide the URL for a specific alert with the ID 'NWS-IDP-PROD-2202530-2064731'.

TaskList.description: Fetch severe weather alerts for the specified latitude and longitude (33.6846, -117.8265).
Retrieve the URL for the specific alert using the provided alert ID.
